name: Unattended Baggage
summary: Five strangers in upper-deck business class on a Pacific crossing encounter a mechanical fault, a flight attendant's strange kindness, and the first hint that their lives have been quietly knotted together for longer than they realized.
hooks: Each PC is on Flight 887 from San Francisco to Taipei for their own reason — at least one of those reasons should have crystallized in the last few days.
The PCs do not know each other at the curtain rise. Some feel vague familiarity. None can explain it yet.
In-medias-res convention applies: the curtain rises mid-flight, in business class, with the PCs already seated and aware of each other.
inGameDate: A Tuesday in late summer 2026. Flight 887, SFO → TPE, departs early evening Pacific time; the cold open is hour six of a fourteen-hour crossing.
